text.title: Data Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure from source inventory to versioned dictionary.

step.name: inventory-sources
step.action: List source systems + the entities each owns. Capture introspected schemas (information_schema or equivalent).

step.name: normalize-fields
step.action: Map every raw column to a canonical field row with typed columns and source_ref. Aliases recorded but canonical name stable.
step.decision-gate: If field type does not fit canonical types, escalate; do not invent new types.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Bind owner_name + owner_role per entity. Anonymous owners block the cycle.

step.name: dq-baseline
step.action: Score all six dimensions per entity. Cite measurement method per score.

step.name: encode-business-rules
step.action: Encode each rule as a machine-checkable predicate with severity. Cap business_rules at 25 per dictionary for v1.

step.name: version-and-publish
step.action: Bump version_tag (semver). Validate against schema. Commit + publish for downstream consumers.
